title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Kaido as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fish bone came flying out of the cell....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you give it a fish without taking out the bones!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? Is there actually something inside of there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Well, first thing's first, get in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you'll stay here until your will breaks and you pledge your allegiance to Master Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Starting tomorrow, we'll push you around until you want to die....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We'll work you to death!! Gyahaha!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 18 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
